query:
MATCH (ap:`attack-pattern`), (ap:`attack-pattern`)-[:achieves]->(_x_mitre_tactic1:`x-mitre-tactic`), (ap:`attack-pattern`)-[:achieves]->(tac:`x-mitre-tactic`)

LIMIT 2000
RETURN DISTINCT ap.mitre_id, ap.name, _x_mitre_tactic1.name, tac.description
ORDER BY rand()
